coverage_note: The bundled SLC45A2 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from SLC45A2 melanocyte development, melanin synthesis and trafficking, hair-follicle pigmentation, melanocyte stem-cell maintenance, and graying biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000164175: SLC45A2 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: SLC45A2 findings should be read against melanocyte development, melanin synthesis and trafficking, hair-follicle pigmentation, melanocyte stem-cell maintenance, and graying biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

SLC45A2 pigmentation variation model is curated as a SLC45A2 marker for Hair pigmentation, skin pigmentation, and graying research context, Melanocyte development, survival, and melanosome biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

SLC45A2 regulatory expression context model is curated as a SLC45A2 marker for Hair pigmentation, skin pigmentation, and graying research context, Melanocyte development, survival, and melanosome biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
